---
package: "openpipeline_spatial"
version: "v0.5.0"
title: "move_layer_spatialdata"
namespace: "Dataflow"
description: ""
type: "module"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline_spatial v0.5.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `move_layer_spatialdata`  
Namespace: `dataflow`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_spatial/tree/v0.5.0/src/dataflow/move_layer_spatialdata)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline_spatial)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline_spatial/v0.5.0/components/dataflow/move_layer_spatialdata)

:::




## Argument groups

### Inputs

|Name            |Description                                                  |Attributes                                |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--input`       |Path to the input SpatialData Zarr store                     |`file`, required, example: `"input.zarr"` |
|`--input_layer` |Name of the layer to move. If not provided, X will be moved. |`string`, example: `"old_layer"`          |


### Outputs

|Name             |Description                                                                                           |Attributes                       |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--output`       |Path to the output SpatialData Zarr store                                                             |`file`, default: `"output.zarr"` |
|`--output_layer` |Name of the new layer to create with the moved data. If not provided, input layer will be moved to X. |`string`, example: `"new_layer"` |


### Options

|Name                   |Description                                                                                                                                                                                                        |Attributes                 |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--delete_input_layer` |Whether to delete the input layer after moving it to the new layer. If true (default), the input layer is moved to the new location, if false it is copied to the new location and the original layer is retained. |`boolean`, default: `TRUE` |

## Authors


  * Dorien Roosen [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/dorien-er) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/dorien-roosen) (maintainer)

  * Luke Zappia [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/lazappi) [{{< fa brands orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7744-8565) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/lazappi) (author)

## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_spatial \
  -r v0.5.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/dataflow/move_layer_spatialdata/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline_spatial/v0.5.0/components/dataflow/move_layer_spatialdata).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_spatial \
  -r v0.5.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/dataflow/move_layer_spatialdata/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).
